source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT TableName,
       Division,
       TransactionDate,
       KPI_Count
INTO #TempData
FROM (
    SELECT 'Customer' AS TableName,
           Division,
           CAST(LP_DateAdded AS DATE) AS TransactionDate,
           COUNT(CustomerID) AS KPI_Count
    FROM EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER
    WHERE LP_DateAdded >= CAST(GETDATE()-30 AS DATE) AND LP_DateAdded < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
    GROUP BY division, CAST(LP_DateAdded AS DATE)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Lead' AS TableName,
           Division,
           CAST(EntryDate AS DATE) AS TransactionDate,
           COUNT(LeadID) AS KPI_Count
    FROM EDW.FACT_Lead
    WHERE EntryDate >= CAST(GETDATE()-30 AS DATE) AND EntryDate < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
    GROUP BY division, CAST(EntryDate AS DATE)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Job' AS TableName,
           Division,
           CAST(ContractDate AS DATE) AS TransactionDate,
           COUNT(JobID) AS KPI_Count
    FROM EDW.FACT_JOB
    WHERE ContractDate >= CAST(GETDATE()-30 AS DATE) AND ContractDate < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
    GROUP BY division, CAST(ContractDate AS DATE)
) AS subquery;

-- Temp Table for possible Date, LP & Division Combinations

SELECT PComb.Division, 
	   PComb.TableName,
	   PComb.TransactionDate,
       TempD.KPI_Count

INTO #PossibleCombination
FROM
	(
	SELECT poss_div.division AS Division,
	       poss_div.LP AS TableName,
		   poss_dt.TransactionDate
		FROM (
			SELECT DATEADD(DAY,-rn ,CAST(GETDATE()-1 AS DATE)) AS TransactionDate
				FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) - 1 AS rn
			FROM sys.objects ) AS Numbers
		WHERE rn< 30
	) AS poss_dt
	CROSS JOIN 
	(
		SELECT DISTINCT division, 'Customer' AS LP FROM EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER
		UNION
		SELECT DISTINCT division, 'Lead' AS LP FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD
		UNION
		SELECT DISTINCT division, 'Job' AS LP FROM EDW.FACT_JOB

	) AS poss_div

) AS PComb 

LEFT JOIN #TempData AS TempD
ON PComb.TableName=TempD.TableName 
AND PComb.Division=TempD.Division 
AND PComb.TransactionDate=TempD.TransactionDate

-- final selection
SELECT  CAST(GETDATE() As Date) AS SnapshotDate,
		CAST(TransactionDate As Date) AS TransactionDate,
		'T-' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR, (ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TableName, Division ORDER BY TransactionDate desc))-1) AS T_Lag,
		TableName,
        Division,
		COALESCE(KPI_Count,0) AS KPI_Count,
        NULL AS Variance,
        NULL AS Variance_decimal,
        Getdate() AS LastUpdateTS
        
FROM #PossibleCombination

-- Drop the temporary table
DROP TABLE #TempData;
DROP TABLE #PossibleCombination;

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_VARIANCE') IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_VARIANCE

source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH Customer_Check as (
	SELECT  
		'Customer' as LP_Name,division,count(CustomerID) as Division_Count
	FROM EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER
	WHERE LP_DateAdded >=CAST(GETDATE()-1 as DATE) and LP_DateAdded < CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)
	GROUP BY Division
), 
Lead_Check as (
	SELECT  
		'Lead' as LP_Name,division,count(LeadID) as Division_Count
	FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD
	WHERE EntryDate >=CAST(GETDATE()-1 as DATE) and EntryDate <CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)
	GROUP BY Division
), 
Job_Check as (
	SELECT  
		'Job' as LP_Name,division,count(JobID) as Division_Count
	FROM EDW.FACT_JOB
	WHERE ContractDate >=CAST(GETDATE()-1 as DATE) and ContractDate <CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)
	GROUP BY Division
), 
All_Divisions as (
	SELECT DISTINCT Division, 'Customer' as LP FROM EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER
	UNION
	SELECT DISTINCT Division, 'Lead' as LP FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD
	UNION
	SELECT DISTINCT Division, 'Job' as LP FROM EDW.FACT_JOB
), 
LP_Union as (
	SELECT * FROM Customer_Check
	UNION
	SELECT * FROM Lead_Check
	UNION
	SELECT * FROM Job_Check
)
SELECT 
	CONCAT(Div.LP,'-',Div.Division) as LP_TableDivisionID,
	Div.LP as LP_TableName,
	Div.Division,
	CASE WHEN LP.Division is not null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as Is_LastRunSuccess,
	COALESCE(LP.Division_Count,0) as LastDateCount,
	Getdate() as LastUpdateTS
FROM All_Divisions Div
Left JOIN LP_Union LP
ON Div.Division=LP.Division and Div.LP=LP.LP_Name

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.Daily_Division_Load')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.Daily_Division_Load

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
	daily.LP_TableName, 
	SUM(CASE WHEN daily.Is_LastRunSuccess = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as LastDateDivisions,
	SUM(daily.LastDateCount) as LastDateDataCount,
	(9 - SUM(CASE WHEN daily.Is_LastRunSuccess = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) as LastDateUnCheckDivisions,
	COALESCE(MAX(dp.DuplicatesExists),0) as LastDateDuplicatesCount,
	Getdate() as LastUpdateTS
FROM ODS.Daily_Division_Load as daily
	LEFT JOIN (
		select SUM(Duplicates) as DuplicatesExists, LP
		FROM (
			SELECT COUNT(CustomerID) as Duplicates, 'Customer' as LP FROM EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER
			GROUP BY CustomerID HAVING COUNT(*)>1
			UNION ALL
			SELECT COUNT(LeadID) as Duplicates, 'Lead' as LP FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD
			GROUP BY LeadID HAVING COUNT(*)>1
			UNION ALL
			SELECT COUNT(JobID) as Duplicates, 'Job' as LP FROM EDW.FACT_JOB
			GROUP BY JobID,ContractID HAVING COUNT(*)>1
				) as subq
		GROUP BY LP
		) dp
ON daily.LP_TableName=dp.LP
GROUP BY daily.LP_TableName

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_Duplicates_Check')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_Duplicates_Check

scripts.text:
UPDATE ODS.LP_VARIANCE
SET Variance=kvar.KPI_Count-kvar.KPI_Lag,
    Variance_decimal = CASE WHEN kvar.KPI_Lag <>0 Then
	   Round(CONVERT(DECIMAL(18, 4), ((kvar.KPI_Count - kvar.KPI_Lag)))/CONVERT(DECIMAL(18, 4), (kvar.KPI_Lag)),4)
		Else 0
		End
FROM (
SELECT TableName,Division,SnapshotDate,TransactionDate,T_Lag,KPI_Count,
LAG(KPI_COUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY TransactionDate,TableName,Division ORDER BY SnapshotDate) as KPI_Lag
FROM ODS.LP_VARIANCE
) as kvar

WHERE ODS.LP_VARIANCE.TableName=kvar.TableName
AND ODS.LP_VARIANCE.Division=kvar.Division
AND ODS.LP_VARIANCE.SnapshotDate=kvar.SnapshotDate
AND ODS.LP_VARIANCE.TransactionDate=kvar.TransactionDate
AND ODS.LP_VARIANCE.T_Lag=kvar.T_Lag;


UPDATE ODS.LP_VARIANCE
SET Variance = 0
WHERE Variance is NULL;

sink.preCopyScript: delete from edw.FACT_LP_VARIANCE_SNAPSHOT where snapshotDate=CAST(GETDATE() as date)
